definitions.en: A feeling of sadness or displeasure caused by the non-fulfillment of one's hopes or expectations.
definitions.es: Un sentimiento de tristeza o desagrado causado por el incumplimiento de las esperanzas o expectativas de uno.
definitions.vi: Cảm giác buồn bã hoặc không hài lòng do không đạt được những hy vọng hoặc mong đợi của bản thân.

example.en: I feel disappointed about the test results.
example.es: Me siento decepcionado por los resultados del examen.
example.vi: Tôi cảm thấy thất vọng về kết quả bài kiểm tra.

notes:
Thất vọng = disappointed. It’s the feeling when reality doesn’t match your hopes.

It’s usually used with cảm thấy (feel) or directly after a subject to describe their emotion. You can also use it to describe someone’s reaction to something.

Close to buồn (sad), but more specific — it’s about unmet expectations. Opposite: hài lòng (satisfied).
exampleSentences: Anh cảm thấy rất thất vọng khi kết quả không như mong đợi.
Chị ấy đã thất vọng vì bạn thân không giữ lời hứa.
Em thất vọng sau khi xem bộ phim đó vì nó không hay như em nghĩ.

content.sentence: Tôi cảm thấy ___ khi không được chọn.

translation.en: I feel disappointed when not being chosen.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He felt very disappointed when the result was not as expected.
She was disappointed because her close friend did not keep the promise.
I was disappointed after watching that movie because it was not as good as I thought.
notes_md:
**Thất vọng** = disappointed. It’s the feeling when reality doesn’t match your hopes.

It’s usually used with **cảm thấy** (feel) or directly after a subject to describe their emotion. You can also use it to describe someone’s reaction to something.


Close to **buồn** (sad), but more specific — it’s about unmet expectations. Opposite: **hài lòng** (satisfied).

translation.en: I feel disappointed after hearing the news.

content.sentence: Tôi cảm thấy ___ sau khi nghe tin.
